scope: Evidence-only staging of exact historical scanner bytes outside active source trees; not runtime adaptation, activation, or a complete legacy source set.

ownerDecisions.reason: The repository owner selected evidence-only staging outside src so exact historical bytes can be preserved without weakening the style-residue validator or treating historical source as active runtime code.

files.notes: Exact historical evidence only. Preserve byte-for-byte outside the active src tree; do not import, adapt, compile, or activate this file in this operation.
Exact historical evidence only. Preserve byte-for-byte outside the active src tree; do not import this stylesheet or weaken style validation in this operation.
Historical dependency evidence only. Do not copy or merge it into scan3/package.json and do not install dependencies during evidence staging.

validation.officialRepositoryLocalNodeValidator: NOT_RUN in the packet-creation container; AI Studio must run scripts/validate-source-packet.cjs after download and extraction.

limitations: This packet preserves historical evidence only and must not be imported by runtime code.
No dependency installation is authorized during this staging operation.
No style-validator exclusion or weakening is authorized.
Runtime adaptation and route activation require separate work and evidence.
The primary candidate commit is not asserted to contain every pre-redesign fix.
